properties.property: {"id":5,"name":"Contest ribbon giver","x":3,"y":4,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"trainer_LADY","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["Gives or upgrades a contest ribbon for the lead "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["Pok\u00E9mon."]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["The method upgradeRibbon either upgrades an "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["existing ribbon to the next one listed, or gives the "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["first ribbon if the Pok\u00E9mon has none of them."]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["Returns nil if couldn\u0027t add/upgrade a ribbon."]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\rHi! I\u0027m the Contest Lady!"]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\rI give out contest ribbons. Do you want one?"]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["Yes","No"],2]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"Yes"]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["pkmn = $player.first_pokemon"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":["ret = pkmn.upgradeRibbon("]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":[" :HOENNCOOL,"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":[" :HOENNCOOLSUPER,"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":[" :HOENNCOOLHYPER,"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":[" :HOENNCOOLMASTER"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":[")"]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["pbSet(1, ret || :NONE)"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":["pbSet(2, pkmn.name)"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":["if ret"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":[" data = GameData::Ribbon.get(ret)"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":[" pbSet(3, data.name)"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":["end"]},{"c":111,"i":1,"p":[12,"pbGet(1) == :NONE"]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\rSorry, your \\v[2] already has the highest ranked "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["Cool Ribbon."]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":411,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\PN received the \\v[3]."]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["\\me[Item get]\\wtnp[40]"]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\PN put the \\v[3] on \\v[2]."]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[1,"No"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\rThat\u0027s your choice."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}

{"id":2,"name":"Daisy","x":5,"y":4,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"NPC 26","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\rDaisy: Hi, \\PN!"]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\rDaisy: Would you like me to groom one of your "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["Pok\u00E9mon?"]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["Yes","No"],2]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"Yes"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\rDaisy: Which Pok\u00E9mon do you want me to groom?"]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["pbChooseNonEggPokemon(1, 2)"]},{"c":111,"i":1,"p":[1,1,0,0,4]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\rDaisy: Oh, okay then."]},{"c":115,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["pkmn = pbGetPokemon(1)"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":["pkmn.changeHappiness(\u0022groom\u0022)"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":["pkmn.beauty \u002B= 40"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\rDaisy: There! \\v[2] looks a lot happier and prettier "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["now!"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[1,"No"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\rDaisy: Oh, okay then."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}

{"id":3,"name":"Dr Footstep","x":1,"y":4,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"NPC 07","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bDr. Footstep: Hi! I rate the footprints of Pok\u00E9mon!"]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bDr. Footstep: Can I rate your Pok\u00E9mon for you?"]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["Yes","No"],2]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"Yes"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bDr. Footstep: Which Pok\u00E9mon do you want me to "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["rate?"]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["pbChooseNonEggPokemon(1, 2)"]},{"c":111,"i":1,"p":[1,1,0,0,4]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\bDr. Footstep: Maybe next time, then."]},{"c":115,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["pkmn = pbGetPokemon(1)"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":["h = pkmn.happiness"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":["stage = 0"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":["stage = 1 if h \u003E= 1"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":["stage = 2 if h \u003E= 50"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":["stage = 3 if h \u003E= 100"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":["stage = 4 if h \u003E= 150"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":["stage = 5 if h \u003E= 200"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":["stage = 6 if h \u003E= 255"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":["pbSet(3, stage)"]},{"c":111,"i":1,"p":[1,3,0,0,0]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\bDr. Footstep: By any chance, you... Are you a very "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["strict person? I feel that your \\v[2] really doesn\u0027t like "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["you..."]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":111,"i":1,"p":[1,3,0,1,0]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\bDr. Footstep: Hmmm... Your \\v[2] may not like you "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["very much."]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":111,"i":1,"p":[1,3,0,2,0]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\bDr. Footstep: The relationship is neither good nor "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["bad... Your \\v[2] looks neutral."]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":111,"i":1,"p":[1,3,0,3,0]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\bDr. Footstep: Your \\v[2] is a little friendly to you... "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["That\u0027s what I\u0027m getting."]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":111,"i":1,"p":[1,3,0,4,0]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\bDr. Footstep: Your \\v[2] is friendly to you. It must be "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["happy with you."]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":111,"i":1,"p":[1,3,0,5,0]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\bDr. Footstep: Your \\v[2] is quite friendly to you! You "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["must be a kind person!"]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":111,"i":1,"p":[1,3,0,6,0]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\bDr. Footstep: Your \\v[2] is super friendly to you! I\u0027m "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["a bit jealous!"]},{"c":111,"i":2,"p":[12,"!pbGetPokemon(1).hasRibbon?(:FOOTPRINT)"]},{"c":101,"i":3,"p":["\\bDr. Footstep: I shall reward your \\v[2] with a ribbon!"]},{"c":355,"i":3,"p":["pkmn = pbGetPokemon(1)"]},{"c":655,"i":3,"p":["pkmn.giveRibbon(:FOOTPRINT)"]},{"c":101,"i":3,"p":["\\PN received the Footprint Ribbon."]},{"c":401,"i":3,"p":["\\me[Item get]\\wtnp[20]"]},{"c":101,"i":3,"p":["\\PN put the Footprint Ribbon on \\v[2]."]},{"c":0,"i":3,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[1,"No"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bDr. Footstep: Maybe next time, then."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}

{"id":4,"name":"Effort ribbon giver","x":2,"y":4,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"NPC 04","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["Looks at the total EVs of the lead Pok\u00E9mon, and "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["rewards a ribbon to it if the total is maxed (equal to "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["Pokemon::EV_LIMIT, which is 510 by default)."]},{"c":355,"i":0,"p":["pkmn = $player.first_pokemon"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":["total = 0"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":["pkmn.ev.each_value { |v| total \u002B= v }"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":["maxed = 0"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":["if total \u003E= Pokemon::EV_LIMIT"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":[" maxed = 1"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":["end"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":["maxed = 2 if pkmn.hasRibbon?(:EFFORT)"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":["pbSet(1, pkmn.name)"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":["pbSet(2, maxed)"]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\rOh?\\nYour \\v[1]..."]},{"c":111,"i":0,"p":[1,2,0,2,0]},{"c":108,"i":1,"p":["Pok\u00E9mon already has an Effort Ribbon."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\rOh! Your \\v[1], that Effort Ribbon looks good on it!"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":411,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":111,"i":1,"p":[1,2,0,1,0]},{"c":108,"i":2,"p":["Pok\u00E9mon has full EVs and does not already have an "]},{"c":408,"i":2,"p":["Effort Ribbon - give it that ribbon."]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\rWent for it stupendously!"]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\rAs its reward, please give it this Effort Ribbon."]},{"c":355,"i":2,"p":["pkmn = $player.first_pokemon"]},{"c":655,"i":2,"p":["pkmn.giveRibbon(:EFFORT)"]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\PN received the Effort Ribbon."]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["\\me[Item get]\\wtnp[20]"]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\PN put the Effort Ribbon on \\v[1]."]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":411,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":108,"i":2,"p":["Pok\u00E9mon does not have full EVs."]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\rYou have to go for it a little harder."]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\rIf you do, I\u0027ll give your Pok\u00E9mon something nice."]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}
